hooks.command: f="SESSION_HANDOFF.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; mt=$(stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); age=$(( $(date +%s) - mt )); [ "$age" -lt 300 ] && exit 0; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Update SESSION_HANDOFF.md with a summary of this turn before stopping (per user preference — keeps session continuity so any new session can pick up from the file)."}'
